summary: Replaced placeholder installed tools/*.ps1 content with real script contents embedded as module-level raw-string constants in cli.py. Added test verifying installed scripts contain real PowerShell logic.

files_changed.summary: Embed 4 PS1 scripts as constants and return real content in _render_install_content
Add test verifying installed scripts contain real PowerShell logic

acceptance.item: Installed ai-kimi-init.ps1 contains param( and Initialized .ai/active_task
At least one installed script can be read from temp cwd after --install --yes
acceptance.evidence: test_install_yes_scripts_contain_real_content reads both init and run scripts

acceptance.item: No real repo writes during tests

risks.description: cli.py grew by ~520 lines due to embedded PS1 scripts.
risks.recommended_review: Consider whether package-data or importlib.resources would be preferable for future maintainability.

open_questions: Should embedded scripts be replaced with dynamic package-data loading in a future refactor?
